meaning: 信息通讯业务,远程信息处理
examples: In addition to the audio, video, user data and telematic information, these signals include information for the proper functioning of the system.
The system architecture, data model, telematic method, allocation method and algorithm of telephone numbers and lines are given out and discussed.
The cars of the future will have powerful panoptic systems to project telematic imagery across the windshield, audiophile sound systems and speech and gesture recognition.
Verizon has its own Connected Home offering and is also working on its LTE-enabled automotive and telematic ecosystem with BMW, Honda, Hyundai, Kia, Toyota and others.
Current research in audio processing includes noise suppression and continuous speech recognition, which can be applied as much to cell phones as to voice-controlled telematic devices in vehicles.
